dialogos.texto_en: Even though it's spring,\nthere are Santa decorations...
Red stockings and a Christmas tree too.\nIt's true that there are stores\nselling Christmas goods all year round.
It feels like it's December all year round here.\nI remember when I sold cakes\nin the cold weather.
Yes, I remember that.\nYou even delivered one to our apartment.\nI appreciated your effort.
Ugh, but to fall into the river on the way to the \ndelivery destination. Thank goodness everyone came \nout of it without catching a cold.
At that time, before I even had time to think\nabout what would happen if you drowned,\nmy body just moved instinctively.
I think everyone felt the same way.
...Right.
Th-that Christmas wasn't very good either.\nLast year, I was too busy studying for exams\nto even think about it.
But the party we had after the study session was \nsmall but fun.\nThe cake that Nino made was delicious, too.
Yeah, it was a nice break.
...I'll say it now, but I was a little surprised\nwhen you gave me a present back then, Uesugi-kun.
Wha-what do you mean by surprised?!\nIt was the least I could do!
W-well, anyhow.\nEven though I worried so much, in the end,\nI just gave you a plain ol' Christmas card.
But I was happy, you know?\nI could feel your sincerity.
That's great, then.
Uesugi-kun, you also used the present\nI gave you, right?
That really helped me out. Thanks to the scarf\nyou gave me, I was able to get through the winter\nwithout any problems.
Teehee, I'm glad I could be of help.
I was worried about you,\nsince you don't even wear a coat,\neven in the middle of winter.
Sorry about that.\nI think I'll give you something practical\nfor this year's Christmas present.
If it's a gift from you, I'd be happy with anything.\nEven if it's just a handwritten Christmas card.
...I wonder how we'll spend Christmas this year?
That's still a long way off. I can't even imagine it,\nand there are too many things that could happen\nbefore we get to Christmas.
Ahaha...\nFirst of all, I'm worried about\nkeeping up with my classes at university.
Maybe this Christmas will just have to be a simple one.
Oooohh!\nI'll do my best to make sure that doesn't happen!
You swear?\nRepeating a school year is out of the question, you know?
I want to spend it together.\nIt IS Christmas, after all.
Y-yes, that's true.\nJust the two of us, Uesugi-kun and I%p-2;――
B-but!\nIsn't it important\nto spend Christmas with family, too?
In fact, it seems like spending Christmas with family\nis more common overseas!
Well, whether it's just the two of us or with everyone else,\nas long as we spend it together, that's enough for me.
...Me too.
Let's have a big party this year!\nSo we can make up for last year!
That's a great idea.\nLet's invite Raiha-chan too and have fun with everyone.
We'll prepare a big cake and roast a chicken.\nI also want to decorate a gorgeous Christmas tree.
Why don't we buy some decorations from this store now\nwhile we're at it?
That's a bit too early, don't you think?\nIt'll become a burden to carry around.
But, I understand how you feel.\nI'm looking forward to it too.
Actually, how about we exchange gifts,\njust the two of us,\nafter the party with everyone?
That...makes me even more excited.
Alright!\nI'll carefully think about it\nand give you the best present!
Is it okay to say something like that?\nYou're raising the bar pretty high.
...Don't get your hopes up too high.
(I suppose this will be my third Christmas with Itsuki.)
(The seasons will come and go.\n But no matter how many do, I'm sure I'll always be\n looking forward to how I'll spend that day with her.)
